sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_replacement (id Int32, name String, age Int32);
INSERT INTO test_replacement (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30), (2, 'Bob', 25);
SELECT REPLACE(name, 'Alice', 'Alicia') AS name_replaced, age FROM test_replacement;
UPDATE test_replacement SET age = REPLACE(age, 30, 31) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT REPLACE(name, 'Bob', 'Robert') AS name_replaced FROM test_replacement WHERE age < 30;
